title: Chisel Me : Player Scaler
description: A datapack that lets players dynamically change their size in Minecraft. Vanilla-compatible and easy to use.
body:
**Chisel Me : Player Scaler is an innovative datapack that allows players to dynamically change their size in Minecraft, providing a unique and customizable gameplay experience.**

---

Using special **crafting recipes**, players can create unique items to hold in their offhand and activate their effect by pressing the** F key** (or the key assigned to the **offhand**). These items let players:

- Reset their size to 1x (normal scale).
  
- Increase their size to 2x, 4x, or 16x.
  
- Decrease their size to 0.5x, 0.25x, or 0.125x.

The system is fully integrated with vanilla gameplay, requiring no external mods, and offers a simple, intuitive way to change size, affecting the player’s view and world perception.

Perfect for custom adventures, mapmakers, or simply exploring Minecraft from new perspectives!
